description.zh-Hans: 生成可视化的低频振荡波形图，以像素图形显示。根据归一化帧时间渲染由频率、振幅和偏移参数调制的选定波形（正弦、锯齿、三角、方波）。输出波形可视化效果，可用于预览动画曲线。
description.en: Generates a visual LFO waveform display as a pixel graph. Renders the selected waveform (sine, sawtooth, triangle, square) modulated by frequency, amplitude, and offset parameters, driven by a normalized frame time. The output is a waveform visualization useful for previewing animation curves.

triggers.zh-Hans: 参数动画, 波形, LFO, 振荡, 波形可视化
triggers.en: parameter animation, waveform, LFO, oscillation, wave visualization

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 预览正弦波动画曲线，配合帧序列节点用于像素动画调试。
exampleUsage.en: Preview a sine wave animation curve, paired with FrameSequence node for pixel animation debugging.
